nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Plocepasser
nodes.summary: Plocepasser（Plocepasser）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如White-browed sparrow-weaver、Donaldson Smith's sparrow-weaver、Chestnut-crowned sparrow-weaver等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Donaldson Smith's sparrow-weaver
nodes.summary: Donaldson Smith's sparrow-weaver (Plocepasser donaldsoni) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in Africa from southern Ethiopia to central Kenya and southern Somalia. It was named in honor of the 19th-century American explorer Arthur Donaldson Smith. References External links Donaldson-Smith's sparrow-weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch.
